ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: Is_YPF__c && (NOT(ISBLANK( Commission_Amount_New__c )) || NOT(ISBLANK( TEXT(Commission_Calculation_Method__c) )) || NOT(ISBLANK( Commission_Percentage__c )) || NOT(ISBLANK( Commission_To__c )) || NOT(ISBLANK( TEXT(Commission_Type__c) )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot fill the commission information in YPF order.
